title: UGC Prompt Maker
description: Claude artifact that turns a product brief into ready-to-shoot UGC scripts — hook, body, CTA, plus shot/voice cues. The fastest way I've found to skip the blank page on a new ad.

title: Claude Instagram Carousel Maker — by Artem
description: Notion-hosted Claude project instructions that turn a single idea into a slide-by-slide native-feeling Instagram carousel. Plug it into a Claude Project and you've got a carousel factory.

title: Synthetic UGC Creator Workflow — by Vizn
description: End-to-end synthetic UGC pipeline: pick a creator, generate the script, render the avatar + voice, ship the ad. Vizn's playbook for AI-UGC at scale.

title: Top Static Ads — Q5 Mobile, by Spiral
description: A curated Figma wall of top-performing Q5 mobile-app static ads. Steal layouts, hook framings, and CTA stacks straight from the leaderboard.
